playlists.name: Sunlit Indie Reflections
playlists.description: A calm and evocative mix of indie folk and soft alternative tracks, perfect for introspective moments and mellow afternoons.
playlists.cover_prompt: soft golden sunlight through forest leaves, gentle and warm ambience, pastel colors, airy and natural

playlists.name: Neon Nights & Dance Floors
playlists.description: High energy EDM, tropical house, afro beats, and modern club sounds to keep the night alive and the party moving.
playlists.cover_prompt: neon-lit urban nightclub, vibrant colorful lights, energetic crowd, dynamic and modern vibes

playlists.name: Golden Era Rock Anthems
playlists.description: Classic and timeless rock tracks with guitars and unforgettable energy from the 70s and 80s, capturing the spirit of rock's glory days.
playlists.cover_prompt: vintage concert stage with dramatic orange-red lighting, roaring crowd shadows, retro rock vibe

playlists.name: Late Night Soul & Vulnerability
playlists.description: Heartfelt and soulful tracks with emotional depth, blending modern pop soul and soft r&b for late night mood-setting.
playlists.cover_prompt: dimly lit room with soft shadows, warm lamp glows, intimate and moody atmosphere

playlists.name: Eclectic Modern Pop Vibes
playlists.description: A diverse mix of fresh, catchy modern pop tracks spanning different moods and artists, ideal for uplifting everyday moments.
playlists.cover_prompt: bright pastel urban street scene in daytime, clean lines, playful and fresh aesthetic

playlists.name: Dreamy & Atmospheric Escapes
playlists.description: Ethereal and textured soundscapes blending dream pop, shoegaze, and ambient folk for immersive listening experiences.
playlists.cover_prompt: misty twilight with blurred city lights, soft blue and purple hues, dreamy and surreal
